tasks.description: Review CSS092 Sub 1 shunt trip matrix against drawings and confirm design intent for Q11-1 versus Q11-3 operation.
tasks.acceptance: Engineering confirmation issued that only E-stop should trip Q11-3; transformer-related trips act on Q11-1 only.
tasks.evidence: 24/02/2026 Mark confirmed only the E-stop should trip Q11-3 and advised site metering test to confirm any unintended voltage on the Q11-3 shunt coil.

tasks.description: Perform on-site functional test of the shunt trip circuits, meter the Q11-3 shunt coil during temp/arc simulation, and rectify wiring if Q11-3 receives unintended trip voltage.
tasks.dependencies: Shutdown / HV access permit; agreed test method; engineer support if rectification is required.
tasks.acceptance: Q11-3 remains closed for transformer-related trip simulation and recorded test results show no unintended trip voltage applied to its shunt coil.
tasks.evidence: Engineering intent confirmed in email, but no searched email showed completed field verification or rectification sign-off.

tasks.description: Confirm BWD-3K130 transformer temperature controller operation using simulation mode and verify alarm / trip outputs for CSS092.
tasks.dependencies: Shutdown / HV access and latest controller manual.
tasks.acceptance: Simulation proves controller outputs operate correctly and test results are captured.
tasks.evidence: 27/02/2026 email set out intended operation and practical test steps, but no returned test record was sighted in the searched emails.

tasks.description: Identify the faulty transformer fan motor / sensor, source a suitable spare or replacement, install it, and prove correct fan operation.
tasks.dependencies: Shutdown of Sub 1 / batch plant; photos or nameplate details; parts availability.
tasks.acceptance: Replacement fan / sensor fitted, fan fault cleared, and fan operation proven under controller output.
tasks.evidence: 24/02/2026 to 05/03/2026 emails show the fan fault was raised, photos / nameplate details were requested, and PBE was looking to use a spare from another sub.

tasks.description: Coordinate weekend shutdown window, HV access permits, and technician availability for CSS092 fan / controller rectification works.
tasks.dependencies: T2D production window, HV access permit, and technician availability.
tasks.acceptance: Shutdown / permit confirmed and technician booked to complete outstanding rectification works.
tasks.evidence: 05/03/2026 Brendan advised site would be in full production from 16/03/2026 and outstanding works would need to move to weekends.

tasks.description: Connect remote start controls into the CSS092 emergency genset and ATS during shutdown.
tasks.acceptance: Remote start control cabling terminated and ready for functional testing.
tasks.evidence: 10/03/2026 James advised that on Sunday 08/03/2026 the remote start controls were connected into the emergency genset and ATS.

tasks.description: Diagnose and configure the CSS092 genset remote start digital input so the genset starts automatically from the ATS / remote input.
tasks.dependencies: Laptop / configuration software for genset controller and commissioning window.
tasks.acceptance: Genset starts in AUTO from remote / ATS input.
tasks.evidence: 10/03/2026 James reported CSS092 would not start from remote input; 11/03/2026 he confirmed the CSS092 genset and ATS were commissioned and functional.

tasks.description: Complete CSS092 ATS and emergency genset functional commissioning.
tasks.dependencies: Remote start input operational and site available for testing.
tasks.acceptance: ATS and genset commissioned and functional.
tasks.evidence: 11/03/2026 email from James: CSS092 genset and ATS is now commissioned and functional.

tasks.description: Issue CSS092 commissioning closeout documents including SAT, eCoC, photos and test sheets.
tasks.dependencies: SAT template and subcontractor closeout package.
tasks.acceptance: SAT, eCoC, photos and test sheets issued to PBE / client.
tasks.evidence: 10/03/2026 James said eCoC / photos would follow after commissioning; 11/03/2026 he requested the SAT template; no final closeout package was sighted in the searched emails.

tasks.description: Prepare and issue an engineering letter covering the as-installed door relocation workaround at CSS092 / associated substation works.
tasks.dependencies: Engineer review of the as-installed workaround and supporting design information.
tasks.acceptance: Engineering letter issued to T2D for the implemented workaround.
tasks.evidence: 16/03/2026 Kyle advised the site had already moved the door and requested an engineering letter for the completed works.

tasks.description: Arrange T2D plant induction for the two generators associated with CSS092 works.
tasks.dependencies: T2D plant team requirements and generator details / documents.
tasks.acceptance: Both generators inducted through the plant team.
tasks.evidence: 16/03/2026 Kyle requested that the two generators be plant inducted through the T2D plant team.
